title: NanoTS: A deep learning tool for accurate SNP calling in nanopore long-read transcriptome data
author: Zelin, Liu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Zenodo record provides the data and scripts used to benchmark NanoTS, a deep learning-based SNP caller for long-read RNA sequencing, against existing methods using Genome in a Bottle (GIAB) samples.
steps_raw: This Zenodo record provides the data and scripts used to benchmark NanoTS, a deep learning-based SNP caller for long-read RNA sequencing, against existing methods using Genome in a Bottle (GIAB) samples.
